stemHtml: You are the pilot flying a FBW aircraft. If you need to execute a terrain avoidance manoeuvre, what should you do?

options.a: Push the stick max AFT WITHOUT hesitation.
options.b: Push the stick max AFT until you reach flaps up speed.
options.c: Push the stick AFT with caution so the A/T has time to react.
options.d: Keep the AP on and let it execute the manoeuvre.
